Name: UUserWidget
Description: The user widget is extensible by users through the WidgetBlueprint.

Variables.Name: ColorAndOpacity
Variables.Description: The color and opacity of this widget.  Tints all child widgets.

Variables.Name: ForegroundColor
Variables.Description:
The foreground color of the widget, this is inherited by sub widgets.  Any color property
	  that is marked as inherit will use this color.

Variables.Name: Padding
Variables.Description: The padding area around the content.

Variables.Name: ActiveSequencePlayers
Variables.Description: All the sequence players currently playing

Variables.Name: StoppedSequencePlayers
Variables.Description: List of sequence players to cache and clean up when safe

Variables.Name: NamedSlotBindings
Variables.Description: Stores the widgets being assigned to named slots

Variables.Name: WidgetTree
Variables.Description: The widget tree contained inside this user widget initialized by the blueprint

Variables.Name: bIsFocusable
Variables.Description: Setting this flag to true, allows this widget to accept focus when clicked, or when navigated to.

Variables.Name: bCanEverTick
Variables.Description: If a widget doesn't ever need to tick the blueprint, setting this to false is an optimization.

Variables.Name: bCanEverPaint
Variables.Description: If a widget doesn't ever need to do custom painting in the blueprint, setting this to false is an optimization.

Variables.Name: bCookedWidgetTree
Variables.Description:
If this user widget was created using a cooked widget tree.  If that's true, we want to skip a lot of the normal
	  initialization logic for widgets, because these widgets have already been initialized.

Functions.Name: AddToViewport
Functions.Description:
Adds it to the game's viewport and fills the entire screen, unless SetDesiredSizeInViewport is called
	  to explicitly set the size.

Params.Name: ZOrder
Params.Description: The higher the number, the more on top this widget will be.

Functions.Name: AddToPlayerScreen
Functions.Description:
Adds the widget to the game's viewport in a section dedicated to the player.  This is valuable in a split screen
	  game where you need to only show a widget over a player's portion of the viewport.

Params.Name: ZOrder
Params.Description: The higher the number, the more on top this widget will be.

Functions.Name: RemoveFromViewport
Functions.Description: Removes the widget from the viewport.

Functions.Name: GetZOrderOfViewportWidget
Functions.Description: Get Z-order of Viewport Widget, added by fourthchen

Functions.Name: SetPositionInViewport
Functions.Description: Sets the widgets position in the viewport.

Params.Name: Position
Params.Description: The 2D position to set the widget to in the viewport.

Params.Name: bRemoveDPIScale
Params.Description: If you've already calculated inverse DPI, set this to false.

Return.Description: true if the widget was added to the viewport using AddToViewport.

Functions.Name: GetOwningLocalPlayer
Functions.Description: Gets the local player associated with this UI.

Return.Description: The owning local player.

Functions.Name: SetOwningLocalPlayer
Functions.Description: Sets the player associated with this UI via LocalPlayer reference.

Params.Name: LocalPlayer
Params.Description: The local player you want to be the conceptual owner of this UI.

Functions.Name: GetOwningPlayer
Functions.Description: Gets the player controller associated with this UI.

Return.Description: The player controller that owns the UI.

Functions.Name: SetOwningPlayer
Functions.Description: Sets the local player associated with this UI via PlayerController reference.

Params.Name: LocalPlayerController
Params.Description: The PlayerController of the local player you want to be the conceptual owner of this UI.

Functions.Name: GetOwningPlayerPawn
Functions.Description: Gets the player pawn associated with this UI.

Return.Description: Gets the owning player pawn that's owned by the player controller assigned to this widget.

Functions.Name: PreConstruct
Functions.Description:
Called by both the game and the editor.  Allows users to run initial setup for their widgets to better preview
	  the setup in the designer and since generally that same setup code is required at runtime, it's called there
	  as well.
	 
	  WARNING
	  This is intended purely for cosmetic updates using locally owned data, you can not safely access any game related
	  state, if you call something that doesn't expect to be run at editor time, you may crash the editor.
	 
	  In the event you save the asset with blueprint code that causes a crash on evaluation.  You can turn off
	  PreConstruct evaluation in the Widget Designer settings in the Editor Preferences.

Functions.Name: Construct
Functions.Description:
Called after the underlying slate widget is constructed.  Depending on how the slate object is used
	  this event may be called multiple times due to adding and removing from the hierarchy.

Functions.Name: Destruct
Functions.Description:
Called when a widget is no longer referenced causing the slate resource to destroyed.  Just like
	  Construct this event can be called multiple times.

Functions.Name: Tick
Functions.Description: Ticks this widget.  Override in derived classes, but always call the parent implementation.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The space allotted for this widget

Params.Name: InDeltaTime
Params.Description: Real time passed since last tick

Functions.Name: IsInteractable
Functions.Description: Gets a value indicating if the widget is interactive.

Functions.Name: OnFocusReceived
Functions.Description: Called when keyboard focus is given to this widget.  This event does not bubble.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InFocusEvent
Params.Description: FocusEvent

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnFocusLost
Functions.Description: Called when this widget loses focus.  This event does not bubble.

Params.Name: InFocusEvent
Params.Description: FocusEvent

Functions.Name: OnAddedToFocusPath
Functions.Description:
If focus is gained on on this widget or on a child widget and this widget is added
	  to the focus path, and wasn't previously part of it, this event is called.

Params.Name: InFocusEvent
Params.Description: FocusEvent

Functions.Name: OnRemovedFromFocusPath
Functions.Description:
If focus is lost on on this widget or on a child widget and this widget is
	  no longer part of the focus path.

Params.Name: InFocusEvent
Params.Description: FocusEvent

Functions.Name: OnKeyChar
Functions.Description: Called after a character is entered while this widget has focus

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InCharacterEvent
Params.Description: Character event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnPreviewKeyDown
Functions.Description:
Called after a key (keyboard, controller, ...) is pressed when this widget or a child of this widget has focus
	  If a widget handles this event, OnKeyDown will not be passed to the focused widget.
	 
	  This event is primarily to allow parent widgets to consume an event before a child widget processes
	  it and it should be used only when there is no better design alternative.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InKeyEvent
Params.Description: Key event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnKeyDown
Functions.Description: Called after a key (keyboard, controller, ...) is pressed when this widget has focus (this event bubbles if not handled)

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InKeyEvent
Params.Description: Key event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnKeyUp
Functions.Description: Called after a key (keyboard, controller, ...) is released when this widget has focus

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InKeyEvent
Params.Description: Key event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnAnalogValueChanged
Functions.Description: Called when an analog value changes on a button that supports analog

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: InAnalogInputEvent
Params.Description: Analog Event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnMouseButtonDown
Functions.Description: The system calls this method to notify the widget that a mouse button was pressed within it. This event is bubbled.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Return.Description: Whether the event was handled along with possible requests for the system to take action.

Functions.Name: OnPreviewMouseButtonDown
Functions.Description:
Just like OnMouseButtonDown, but tunnels instead of bubbling.
	  If this even is handled, OnMouseButtonDown will not be sent.
	  
	  Use this event sparingly as preview events generally make UIs more
	  difficult to reason about.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Return.Description: Whether the event was handled along with possible requests for the system to take action.

Functions.Name: OnMouseButtonUp
Functions.Description: The system calls this method to notify the widget that a mouse button was release within it. This event is bubbled.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Return.Description: Whether the event was handled along with possible requests for the system to take action.

Functions.Name: OnMouseMove
Functions.Description: The system calls this method to notify the widget that a mouse moved within it. This event is bubbled.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Return.Description: Whether the event was handled along with possible requests for the system to take action.

Functions.Name: OnMouseEnter
Functions.Description: The system will use this event to notify a widget that the cursor has entered it. This event is NOT bubbled.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The Geometry of the widget receiving the event

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Functions.Name: OnMouseLeave
Functions.Description: The system will use this event to notify a widget that the cursor has left it. This event is NOT bubbled.

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Information about the input event

Functions.Name: OnMouseWheel
Functions.Description: Called when the mouse wheel is spun. This event is bubbled.

Params.Name: MouseEvent
Params.Description: Mouse event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnMouseButtonDoubleClick
Functions.Description: Called when a mouse button is double clicked.  Override this in derived classes.

Params.Name: InMyGeometry
Params.Description: Widget geometry

Params.Name: InMouseEvent
Params.Description: Mouse button event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnDragDetected
Functions.Description: Called when Slate detects that a widget started to be dragged.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: MouseMove that triggered the drag

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation that was detected.

Functions.Name: OnDragCancelled
Functions.Description:
Called when the user cancels the drag operation, typically when they simply release the mouse button after
	  beginning a drag operation, but failing to complete the drag.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: Last mouse event from when the drag was canceled.

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation that was canceled.

Functions.Name: OnDragEnter
Functions.Description: Called during drag and drop when the drag enters the widget.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: The mouse event from when the drag entered the widget.

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation that entered the widget.

Functions.Name: OnDragLeave
Functions.Description: Called during drag and drop when the drag leaves the widget.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: The mouse event from when the drag left the widget.

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation that entered the widget.

Functions.Name: OnDragOver
Functions.Description: Called during drag and drop when the the mouse is being dragged over a widget.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: The mouse event from when the drag occurred over the widget.

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation over the widget.

Return.Description: 'true' to indicate that you handled the drag over operation.  Returning 'false' will cause the operation to continue to bubble up.

Functions.Name: OnDrop
Functions.Description: Called when the user is dropping something onto a widget.  Ends the drag and drop operation, even if no widget handles this.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: PointerEvent
Params.Description: The mouse event from when the drag occurred over the widget.

Params.Name: Operation
Params.Description: The drag operation over the widget.

Return.Description: 'true' to indicate you handled the drop operation.

Functions.Name: OnTouchGesture
Functions.Description: Called when the user performs a gesture on trackpad. This event is bubbled.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: GestureEvent
Params.Description: gesture event

Return.Description: Returns whether the event was handled, along with other possible actions

Functions.Name: OnTouchStarted
Functions.Description: Called when a touchpad touch is started (finger down)

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: InTouchEvent
Params.Description: The touch event generated

Functions.Name: OnTouchMoved
Functions.Description: Called when a touchpad touch is moved  (finger moved)

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: InTouchEvent
Params.Description: The touch event generated

Functions.Name: OnTouchEnded
Functions.Description: Called when a touchpad touch is ended (finger lifted)

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Params.Name: InTouchEvent
Params.Description: The touch event generated

Functions.Name: OnMotionDetected
Functions.Description:
Called when motion is detected (controller or device)
	  e.g. Someone tilts or shakes their controller.

Params.Name: MyGeometry
Params.Description: The geometry of the widget receiving the event.

Functions.Name: OnMouseCaptureLost
Functions.Description: Called when mouse capture is lost if it was owned by this widget.

Functions.Name: BindToAnimationStarted
Functions.Description: Bind an animation started delegate.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation to listen for starting or finishing.

Params.Name: Delegate
Params.Description: the delegate to call when the animation's state changes

Functions.Name: UnbindFromAnimationStarted
Functions.Description: Unbind an animation started delegate.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation to listen for starting or finishing.

Params.Name: Delegate
Params.Description: the delegate to call when the animation's state changes

Functions.Name: BindToAnimationFinished
Functions.Description: Bind an animation finished delegate.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation to listen for starting or finishing.

Params.Name: Delegate
Params.Description: the delegate to call when the animation's state changes

Functions.Name: UnbindFromAnimationFinished
Functions.Description: Unbind an animation finished delegate.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation to listen for starting or finishing.

Params.Name: Delegate
Params.Description: the delegate to call when the animation's state changes

Functions.Name: BindToAnimationEvent
Functions.Description: Allows binding to a specific animation's event.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation to listen for starting or finishing.

Params.Name: Delegate
Params.Description: the delegate to call when the animation's state changes

Params.Name: AnimationEvent
Params.Description: the event to watch for.

Params.Name: UserTag
Params.Description: Scopes the delegate to only be called when the animation completes with a specific tag set on it when it was played.

Functions.Name: OnAnimationStarted
Functions.Description: Called when an animation is started.

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: the animation that started

Functions.Name: OnAnimationFinished
Functions.Description: Called when an animation has either played all the way through or is stopped

Params.Name: Animation
Params.Description: The animation that has finished playing

Functions.Name: SetColorAndOpacity
Functions.Description: Sets the tint of the widget, this affects all child widgets.

Params.Name: InColorAndOpacity
Params.Description: The tint to apply to all child widgets.

Functions.Name: SetForegroundColor
Functions.Description:
Sets the foreground color of the widget, this is inherited by sub widgets.  Any color property 
	  that is marked as inherit will use this color.

Params.Name: InForegroundColor
Params.Description: The foreground color.

Functions.Name: PlayAnimation
Functions.Description: Plays an animation in this widget a specified number of times

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation to play

Params.Name: StartAtTime
Params.Description: The time in the animation from which to start playing, relative to the start position. For looped animations, this will only affect the first playback of the animation.

Params.Name: NumLoopsToPlay
Params.Description: The number of times to loop this animation (0 to loop indefinitely)

Params.Name: PlayMode
Params.Description: Specifies the playback mode

Params.Name: PlaybackSpeed
Params.Description: The speed at which the animation should play

Functions.Name: PlayAnimationTo
Functions.Description: Plays an animation in this widget a specified number of times stoping at a specified time

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation to play

Params.Name: StartAtTime
Params.Description: The time in the animation from which to start playing, relative to the start position. For looped animations, this will only affect the first playback of the animation.

Params.Name: EndAtTime
Params.Description: The absolute time in the animation where to stop, this is only considered in the last loop.

Params.Name: NumLoopsToPlay
Params.Description: The number of times to loop this animation (0 to loop indefinitely)

Params.Name: PlayMode
Params.Description: Specifies the playback mode

Params.Name: PlaybackSpeed
Params.Description: The speed at which the animation should play

Functions.Name: StopAnimation
Functions.Description: Stops an already running animation in this widget

Functions.Name: JumpAnimation
Functions.Description: Stop and jump to the specified time in this widget

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation to jump

Params.Name: JumpAtTime
Params.Description: specified time

Functions.Name: PauseAnimation
Functions.Description: Pauses an already running animation in this widget

Return.Description: the time point the animation was at when it was paused, relative to its start position.  Use this as the StartAtTime when you trigger PlayAnimation.

Functions.Name: GetAnimationCurrentTime
Functions.Description: Gets the current time of the animation in this widget

Return.Description: the current time of the animation.

Functions.Name: IsAnimationPlaying
Functions.Description: Gets whether an animation is currently playing on this widget.

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation to check the playback status of

Return.Description: True if the animation is currently playing
True if any animation is currently playing

Functions.Name: SetNumLoopsToPlay
Functions.Description: Changes the number of loops to play given a playing animation

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation that is already playing

Params.Name: NumLoopsToPlay
Params.Description: The number of loops to play. (0 to loop indefinitely)

Functions.Name: SetPlaybackSpeed
Functions.Description: Changes the playback rate of a playing animation

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The animation that is already playing

Functions.Name: ReverseAnimation
Functions.Description: If an animation is playing, this function will reverse the playback.

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The playing animation that we want to reverse

Functions.Name: IsAnimationPlayingForward
Functions.Description: returns true if the animation is currently playing forward, false otherwise.

Params.Name: InAnimation
Params.Description: The playing animation that we want to know about

Functions.Name: PlaySound
Functions.Description: Plays a sound through the UI

Return.Description: The uobject widget corresponding to a given name

Functions.Name: IsPlayingAnimation
Functions.Description: Are we currently playing any animations?

Functions.Name: GetCacheLayerId
Functions.Description: return CacheLayerId only windows

Functions.Name: ListenForInputAction
Functions.Description:
Listens for a particular Player Input Action by name.  This requires that those actions are being executed, and
	  that we're not currently in UI-Only Input Mode.

Functions.Name: StopListeningForInputAction
Functions.Description: Removes the binding for a particular action's callback.

Functions.Name: StopListeningForAllInputActions
Functions.Description: Stops listening to all input actions, and unregisters the input component with the player controller.

Functions.Name: RegisterInputComponent
Functions.Description:
ListenForInputAction will automatically Register an Input Component with the player input system.
	  If you however, want to Pause and Resume, listening for a set of actions, the best way is to use
	  UnregisterInputComponent to pause, and RegisterInputComponent to resume listening.

Functions.Name: UnregisterInputComponent
Functions.Description:
StopListeningForAllInputActions will automatically Register an Input Component with the player input system.
	  If you however, want to Pause and Resume, listening for a set of actions, the best way is to use
	  UnregisterInputComponent to pause, and RegisterInputComponent to resume listening.

Functions.Name: IsListeningForInputAction
Functions.Description: Checks if the action has a registered callback with the input component.
